build.beforeBuildCommand: vp run --filter @t4code/web build && node ../../scripts/apply-web-brand-assets.ts production apps/web/dist

security.csp: default-src 'self'; connect-src 'self' ipc: http://ipc.localhost http://127.0.0.1:* http://localhost:* ws://127.0.0.1:* ws://localhost:* https: wss:; img-src 'self' asset: http://asset.localhost data: blob:; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; script-src 'self'; font-src 'self' data:; object-src 'none'; base-uri 'self'; frame-ancestors 'none'; form-action 'self'
security.devCsp: default-src 'self'; connect-src 'self' ipc: http://ipc.localhost http://127.0.0.1:* http://localhost:* ws://127.0.0.1:* ws://localhost:* https: wss:; img-src 'self' asset: http://asset.localhost data: blob:; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-eval'; font-src 'self' data:; object-src 'none'; base-uri 'self'; frame-ancestors 'none'; form-action 'self'
